title: SQL: NOT NULL constraint is not checked when applied to
poc: ALTER TABLE foo ALTER COLUMN i SET NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: NOT NULL constraint not enforced after column alteration
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bar (a INT, b VARCHAR(50), c DATE);
INSERT INTO bar (a, b, c) VALUES (1, 'test', '2023-01-01');
ALTER TABLE bar ALTER COLUMN a SET NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO bar (a, b, c) VALUES (NULL, 'example', '2023-01-02');
SELECT * FROM bar WHERE b IS NULL;
